feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Analytics Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP Analytics Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Always login HANA via Live Connection in SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
My company currently using SAC connect to SAP HANA database (on-premise, not HANA cloud). I want to provide about 50 SAC account for 50 Sale Employee in order to view their sales report. The problem is I use a Live Connection, so I must do Data Authorization in HANA. So for each SAC account there is a corresponding HANA account to authorize. I've tried 2 Direct Live Connection: Username Password and SSO. But both of them need to login HANA again every time I restart my laptop or shut down and power on again (for Username Password there is a Set Credential pop-up when access to the story, and for SSO I need to go <host>:<port> to login the HANA account again. But I don't want to provide my sale employees HANA account, It's very sensitive. I just want to go to their device and login HANA once. The questions are: 
1. Is there another solution for my case beside Username Password and SSO?
2. Is there any way to keep the login of Username Password to HANA in SAC, or keep always login in <host>:<port> for SSO after every time I restart the devices?
Thank you !

entry.title: I am unable to use excel file for model creation on SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content: hello there i am unable to use excel/csv file to create model as it option to use excel/csv file is not showing in my modeler. Can someone help me with the situation?

entry.title: General data type in xlsx file from SAP Analytics Cloud dashboard
entry.content:
Hello,
Recently, when we get Excel output from the reports we created in SAC with the ExportToExcel_1.exportReport() function, if Number Formatting is active, the Measure values ​​in the Excel output are output as a text value such as 1,234.55, and therefore the output is in the General data type, and our users are disturbed by this situation.

If we also turn off Number Formatting, this time the data coming to the model comes as it is. For example, 1,234.5456700.
I think there is such a problem due to the last update, but we could not find a workaround method. If anyone can provide information, I would be glad.

When Number Formatting is active (data type : general but measure with comma)

When Number Formatting is not active (data type: number but measure without formatting)

entry.title: how do you schedule story reports to users ?
entry.content:
#story reports #people analytics

I'm working on scheduling a story report for the user. They receive the link, but when they click on it, the report center opens without any visible download option. Should I be using the legacy distribute tool to schedule the story report instead?

 

Thanks

Archie

entry.title: SAC table add/remove dimension members via Script
entry.content:
Hi Everyone

The user wants that in a table some columns (account members) show hidden and if the user wants with a button this members shows

He wants the Excel Group/Ungroup functionality. (see picture)

Accounts are not in hierarchy and Account D is a calculation 

So the user wants to be able to view Account A,B,C and D or only D 

If you could give some example of script to achieve this I will be very grateful

Thanks in advance

entry.title: SAC Currency Conversion - Input Control
entry.content:
Dear all,

I am creating a data model and story in SAC where I am once again seeing some problems.

I have created a model with two measures Amount in LC & Amount in GC with three version Actual, Budget & Forecast.

Now I have created a story with a lot of different calculated measures to show in a few graphs (Actuals vs Forecast CY, Actuals vs Budget, ...). Right now these calculated measures / restricted measures are created on top of the Amount in LC.

I am struggling to do the currency conversion as I am not familiar with the best practice.

Initially I thought that I will create a measure input control which allows to toggle between Amount in LC and Amount in GC. This should have been used to create calculated measures on top of this new measure input control. But when creating this new measure input control I saw the following error

Do you know how I can avoid this? Is there any better way for doing the currency conversion accross multiple calculated measures in the story?

Best and thanks

entry.title: How to show/ hide Indicator charts in SAC dashboard based on roles
entry.content:
Hi ,

We have a story which has a model with data access and privacy enabled and roles created. The table data is getting filtered based on the role as well as the charts data.

But we would like to show or hide the charts based on this role.

How can this be achieved on the SAC dashboard. 

Regards,

Natasha

entry.title: Api to change measure in dynamic reference line
entry.content:
Hi,

how can i change measure in dynamic reference line with api?

is it possibile?

Thanks

entry.title: How to export data from SAC Planning ODE Story into Google Sheets
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have a requirement to export the data from SAC ODE story on a click of a button & import it to Google Sheets. I know which the recent release we have a option to export data to Google slides but I'm looking for Google sheets. Has any one come across such a requirement & what is the custom solution for the same. Thanks.

 

 

Regards

Murali.M

entry.title: Hierarchy not brought in via Cloud data integration connection in Datasphere
entry.content: When I tried to bring in the Master Data (from the Dimension Table) via the SAC Connection created in Datasphere using the Cloud Data Integration connection in Datasphere, the Hierarchy is not brought into Datasphere from the Dimension table in SAC Model. Other columns like Member ID and Description are brought in except the Hierarchy column. I tried via both the Remote Tables and Data Flow; the Hierarchy is not brought in from SAC to Datasphere using the Cloud Data Integration (CDI) connection. Can you support on how to bring the Hierarchy using the CDI connection.

entry.title: replicating S/4 VDM models in Datasphere
entry.content:
Hello Friends,

Given that there is a vast array of CDS views and Queries withing SAP S/4 VDM, is it necessary to recreate similar models in Datasphere?  It sounds like a duplication of effort.  What do you all think?  What would be the best practice in this regard?  As you know, SAP SAC provides live connection to S/4 for reporting utilizing the vast array of built-in CDS Analytical Queries.   There must be a blog on this subject, but I cannot find it.  Let me know if you know of any blogs on this subject.

Thanks

Abdul

entry.title: How to avoid in a story that tables are refreshed with data
entry.content:
Hello,

In a story I have 2 tables. The first one is a global report and the second one is a detailed FI documents table.

When we click on a cell of the first table, it shows the second table filtered with accounts, cost centers... It works very well as the second table is always filtered.

Unfortunately, in modification mode, the second table is automatically refreshed with all documents lines (Thousands). It leads to a very long time waiting before being able to modify the story.

What would be the best way to avoid that the second table being refreshed in modification mode (avoid that it loads automatically all data) ?

thanks in advance

Mat

entry.title: How to group different dimension members in sac report
entry.content:
Hi,

I have requirement to show the report based on different dimension members as a group to show in the SAC report. Is it possible to group different dimensions?

Regards,

Vasu

entry.title: SAC Hierarchy node open to left
entry.content:
Hi Everyone 

Is there any way that my hierarchy that is in columns open to the left??

Normal behavior:

 

Desired

SAP Analytics Cloud 

Thanks

entry.title: Need to get planning private version using scripting
entry.content:
Hello All,

I have a requirement of retrieving planning private version from a dropdown box and display it in table. Whenever I select an item from the dropdown box, only the selected item should be added as version filter in the table and other versions must be removed from table.

Components used: Dropdown box, Table 

I have managed to get private versions to the dropdown box but unable to filter the table.

Code used to get private versions to dropdown box dynamically.

*****************

var list = Table_2.getPlanning().getPrivateVersions();
for(var i=0;i<list.length;i++){
Dropdown_3.addItem(list[i].getDisplayId());
Dropdown_3.setSelectedKey(list[0].getDisplayId());
}
*****************

Any help is appreciated. Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Generate Booked Data based on attribute
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

i would need a hand for a data action that has the purpose of generating data, putting “0” on a “Dummy” measure based on an attribute of a dimension.
Let me explain, the user chooses via parameters the other combinations of dimensions.

Example:
User chooses as parameters:
Product= PRD1
Scenario= SCN1

 

EntityScoped
ENT1YES
ENT2YES
ENT3NO
ENT4NO
ENT5NO

The end result is as follows:

EntityProductScenarioDummy
ENT1PRD1SCN10
ENT2PRD1SCN10

Thanks

entry.title: How to change display of variables from a cds
entry.content:
Dear All,

I have a SAC report based on a cds. When I display the variable panel, I see this :

I would like to have by default key (or ID) instead of Description. I can change it but each time I run again the report the default display is on "Description".

thanks for your help

Mat

entry.title: Microchart column custom colors issues SAP UI5/FIORI
entry.content:
same applied in samples too is it a bug or any solution please help 

When applied color property its applied to and top label 100 also applied how could I remove it when try to apply with css on the element its working at debug mode but when applied in code its not working

entry.title: API getMembers() with parentId property is not working
entry.content:
Hello,

In the model I have a Product dimension with hierarchy:

In the story I want to read only root members (Product classes) using script API. I wrote a simple code and specified a parentId property to retrieve such members:

But unfortunately this script returns all the elements of the Product dimension::

Also, I want to mention that in previous versions this code worked. Now I am on 2024.15. Why is it not working now? Maybe I am doing something wrong?

Best Regards,

Anton

entry.title: cumulative amounts
entry.content: I wanted to ask please how I can create a line graph of cumulative amounts over a period of time
